_note: Two-pass hi-res final: generates at 2/3 target size then upscales 1.5x with a refine pass (denoise 0.5). Produces noticeably sharper detail, cleaner edges, and less artifact noise than a single-pass generation. Use for approved compositions that need to be publish-ready. Slower (two sampling passes) but worth it for finals.
template: {prompt}, {palette} palette, {lighting}, ultra-detailed, crisp sharp focus, professional quality, clean zone left for title
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, soft focus, low quality, compression artifacts, noise, grain, extra limbs, deformed

rubric.sharpness: 1-5 — are fine details crisp, not mushy?
